steps.name: Adapter port types and mock adapter
steps.criteria: Adapter and session handle port types are defined. Mock factory exists for test injection. All UA-1..6 unit tests pass.
steps.scenario_name: UA-1, UA-2, UA-3, UA-4, UA-5, UA-6

steps.name: Event bridge translation functions
steps.criteria: Event bridge translates SandboxAgent events to Brain StreamEvent variants. Unknown events are logged and skipped. All UB-1..7 unit tests pass.
steps.scenario_name: UB-1, UB-2, UB-3, UB-4, UB-5, UB-6, UB-7

steps.name: StreamEvent types and schema migration
steps.criteria: StreamEvent union extended with permission request variant. Schema migration adds provider and session type fields. bun migrate succeeds. UC-1..5 validate field presence.

steps.name: Session store SurrealDB CRUD
steps.criteria: Session store provides create, status update, active query, and external ID update operations. All UC-1..5 tests pass.

steps.name: Replace in-memory registry with session store
steps.criteria: Module-level session registry eliminated. Session lookup routes through SurrealDB via session store. HP-5 passes (status shows active).

steps.name: Wire adapter for spawn and prompt
steps.criteria: Session creation delegates to adapter. Prompt delivery delegates to adapter instead of returning 409. HP-1 and HP-6 pass.

steps.name: Route wiring and event bridge to SSE
steps.criteria: Adapter injected via route wiring. Event bridge connected to SSE delivery. Old SDK event translation removed. HP-2 and HP-3 pass.

steps.name: Walking skeleton E2E acceptance test
steps.criteria: WS-1 passes: spawn, prompt, SSE events, SurrealDB record verified. Error paths EP-1, EP-2, EP-5 pass.

steps.name: Multi-turn, persistence, remaining tests
steps.criteria: WS-2, WS-3, HP-4 pass. Error paths EP-3, EP-4, EP-6, EP-7 pass. Edge cases EC-1, EC-2 pass.
steps.scenario_name: WS-2, WS-3, HP-4, EP-3, EP-4, EP-6, EP-7, EC-1, EC-2
